description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch. The workflow should have two jobs: one for macOS and one for Linux. The macOS job should run on macos-12 and macos-13, set up Python 3.9, install packages and modules, and compile the code. The Linux job should run on ubuntu-22.04, install dependencies, compile the code, and optionally test and publish coverage.
